---
title: "Thomas Van Hoey"
subtitle: "List of Courses"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: lualatex
    # template: template_thomas.tex
CJKmainfont: Noto Sans CJK TC
sansfont: Georgia
mainfont: Noto Serif # Noto Serif
header-includes:
  - \newcommand{\br}{\\}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



\begin{tabular}{p{1.9cm}p{10cm}p{3cm}}
2025 & Algemene taalwetenschap 2 \newline \quad \textit{Intro to Linguistics 2} (F0AA4A) [NL] [lecture] & KU Leuven \\
2025 & Algemene taalwetenschap 1 \newline \quad \textit{Intro to Linguistics 1} (F0AA3A) [NL] [lecture] & KU Leuven \\
2024 & Algemene taalwetenschap 1 \newline \quad \textit{Intro to Linguistics 1} (F0AA3A) [NL] [lecture] & KU Leuven \\



2024 & Language Varieties and Language Variants \newline \quad (F0VH3A) [EN] [seminar] & KU Leuven \\
2024 & Introduction to Cognitive Linguistics \newline \quad (LING 7011) [EN] & HKU \\
2023 & Lexical Semantics and Lexicology \newline \quad  (F0TU0A) [EN] & KU Leuven \\
2022 & Introduction to Cognitive Linguistics \newline \quad  (LING 7011) [EN] & HKU \\
2020 & English conversation A \quad  [EN, ZH]  & Tatung University \\
2019 & English conversation B \quad [EN, ZH] & Tatung University \\
\end{tabular}
